science_nonfixed_routes.plain_name: 通信・信号・波・電気測定
science_nonfixed_routes.evidence_basis: 90-subject round15 comparison; this branch has 30 exact-time cases | mother_clean=5, mother_partial=8
science_nonfixed_routes.human_reading: 信号・通信枝: 3室/6室/8室/11室の反復、土星/火星/天王星/ノードが、波・電気・伝送・標準化を技術化する側に出るかを見る。
science_nonfixed_routes.next_action: Do not score as route. Recollect source-backed exact cases if priority.

surviving_narrow_packet_candidates.working_commonality: public explanation that becomes a system, method, or teachable doctrine
surviving_narrow_packet_candidates.manual_read_why: All four subjects convert interpretation into a public framework: songwriter-cultural voice, filmmaker persona and moral genre, investment method/author, psychoanalytic system founder. Unlike the larger packets, this one has a repeated explicit Mercury/house-pressure feature bundle.
surviving_narrow_packet_candidates.stress_effective_support_read: 4 strict core plus 3 strong partial fits; keep as provisional, not named/frozen
surviving_narrow_packet_candidates.stress_core_read: core_exact survives as a coherent packet: public explanation, interpretation, or authored method becomes a durable system/framework
surviving_narrow_packet_candidates.stress_boundary_read: the same feature bundle appears with other second routes, so the packet cannot be defined by Mercury/H6/pressure features alone; second-route context is necessary
surviving_narrow_packet_candidates.next_action: collect more exact cases and split by second-route context if feature bundle appears outside teacher/media alignment

publication_guardrails: Current fixed routes are route families or branches supported by existing exact cohorts; they are not universal deterministic career classifiers.
The surviving narrow packet is not yet a fixed route claim. It remains a provisional packet candidate.
Watch-packet subbranches are not route claims. They are repeated internal split signals waiting for fresh exact repeats.
Science registry rows in NOT_FIXED or UNDERFILLED states must be published as retained clues or future collection targets, not as confirmed routes.
Blind ingress and top-route assignment should be described as route pressure observation, not final classification.
